event.description: Drilling crew hits a subsurface ice deposit

subsim_log.sexpr:
(let ((food 1.48)
              (water 1.23)
              (pop 6)
              (crisis 0.00))
          (if (> crisis 0.5)
            (list "ration" (* food 0.8) (* water 0.7))
            (if (> food 1.5)
              (list "expand" (+ pop 2) food)
              (list "maintain" pop food))))

colonist_diaries.entry:
Year 45 — Nova (water)
Mood: hopeful. Event: Drilling crew hits a subsurface ice deposit.
Action: gather_food. Colony morale: strained.

Year 45 — Frost Nakamura (water)
Mood: contemplative. Event: Drilling crew hits a subsurface ice deposit.
Action: run_subsim. Colony morale: strained.

Year 45 — Ares (water)
Mood: determined. Event: Drilling crew hits a subsurface ice deposit.
Action: explore. Colony morale: strained.
